lastUpdate.note: No Visa Granted today. All Applicants are requested to be careful about current circumstances before lodging their visa applications. We appreciate your support for this website.

announcements.title: Processing Times Update
announcements.message: Australian Home Affairs is currently processing Subclass 500 visas within 13-20 days for Bangladeshi applicants.

announcements.title: GTE Requirements Reminder
announcements.message: Applicants are advised to prepare comprehensive GTE (Genuine Temporary Entrant) statements. Recent refusals are mainly GTE-related.

announcements.title: Health Examination
announcements.message: All student visa applicants from Bangladesh must undergo health examination at approved BSMI panel clinics.
